narrative:
Hopewell-Loudon Local Sd (Seneca) school district has 2,869 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points.
